title: The Calcutta High Court (Extension of Jurisdiction) Act, 1953
full_text: The Calcutta High Court (Extension of Jurisdiction) Act, 1953 कलकत्ता उच्‍च न्‍यायालय (अधिकारिता विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1953 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1953-41 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 1953-12-18 Act Year: 1953 Short Title: The Calcutta High Court (Extension of Jurisdiction) Act, 1953 Hindi Title: कलकत्ता उच्‍च न्‍यायालय (अधिकारिता विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1953 Long Title: An Act to extend the jurisdiction of the High Court at Calcutta to Chandernagore and the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Justice Enforcement Date: 18-12-1953 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Calcutta High Court (Extension of Jurisdiction) Act, 1953 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Extension of jurisdiction of Calcutta High Court to Chandernagore and Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Section 3. Effect of certain orders. Section 4. Power to make rules.
